name: LHV Open Banking PSD2 REST API
description:
LHV Pank's implementation of the PSD2 specification. Current service has been built only as a demo to introduce the functionality. The performance, availability and the data accuracy is not guaranteed and may vary over time and without prior notice.

  • To use the Sandbox API directly using your own software or some API testing tool like Postman you must also provide a transport layer certificate in your HTTP requests to API endpoints. In production environment this is the place where you shall use the eIDAS PSD2 compliant QWAC certificate. In the Sandbox API you should use a custom generated test certificate.

  • Our API uses OAuth2 as a pre-step for PSU identification.
    In current Sandbox implementation we allow you to skip this step and provide you with two pre-generated authorization tokens:

    Bearer Liis-MariMnnik and Bearer donaldduck

    You can use the tokens by clicking on the Authorize button and entering it into the authorization form.
